label: New Hampshire Electric Cooperative
notes: NISC SmartHub portal — extension scrapes billing + usage. kWh unverified on a real NHEC generation meter; verify before trusting reports.

label: Eversource (PSNH — NH / MA / CT)
notes: Public Service Company of New Hampshire d/b/a Eversource Energy. Bespoke MyAccount portal (Okta). Cloud Capture harvester (api/harvester/vendors/eversource.py) — password login + usage sniff. MFA-enabled accounts may fail until a warm session exists.

label: Liberty Utilities (Granite State Electric) Corp.
notes: Liberty Utilities (Granite State Electric) Corp. — Algonquin/AQN, formerly Granite State Electric. Investor-owned, NOT on NISC SmartHub. Customer billing runs on a third-party portal (Paymentus/KUBRA-class); a bespoke adapter needs a live Liberty login to reverse-engineer, like GMP. Manual PDF upload accepted until the adapter ships.

label: Unitil Energy Systems, Inc. (UES — NH)
notes: Unitil Energy Systems, Inc. (UES). Unitil customer portal — bespoke, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.
